overview.remaining_palpites: {{count}} predictions left to complete group stage
overview.activity_empty: As soon as the pool starts receiving predictions, joins and official results, the activity will appear here in real time.
overview.invite_desc: Bring more people in to predict, compete and fight for the top of the table with you.
overview.disclaimer: ⚠️ ArenaCup **does not** process payments or financial transactions. Any amounts must be agreed upon between participants outside the app.

palpites.save_first_desc: Then you can share the result card.
palpites.card_not_ready_desc: Please try again in a moment.
palpites.download_started: Download started. Share it on WhatsApp.
palpites.calendar_unavailable_desc: Once matches are loaded, your predictions will appear here.
palpites.pending_desc: Start with the highlighted matches. Open and pending ones appear first so you can sort them out quickly.
palpites.pending_desc_done: Now you can review saved predictions, share your cards and follow locked matches.
palpites.highlighted_pending: This match is still pending for you.
palpites.queue_pending: Resolve this match before the next deadline.

members.status_hint: Tap a member's status to change it.
members.remove_confirm: Remove this member from the pool?
members.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave the pool?

extras.title: Extra Bets
extras.subtitle: Predict the champion and top scorer to earn decisive extra points!
extras.top_scorer_hint: Type the name of the player you think will score the most goals.

ranking.empty_desc: As members start scoring, the leaderboard will show up here.
ranking.unavailable_desc: I couldn't refresh the live leaderboard right now. Please try again in a few moments.
ranking.breakdown_desc: The new pool separates points by match, phase, tournament and special markets. If a league still uses the legacy mode, all points continue under match scoring.
ranking.share_podium: I'm on the podium in {{position}} place! Catch me if you can 😎

share_card.join_fallback_desc: Step into the arena and prove who's in charge.

create_bolao.title: New Pool

notification.created_desc: You have successfully created the pool '{{name}}'.

financial.warning: Remember: ArenaCup is just a smart spreadsheet. You are responsible for collecting and paying participants.

create_bolao.subtitle: Customize your competition

public.title: Public
public.desc: Open to everyone. Just for fun.

category.paid_desc: If active, you can define entry fee and payment details. The app helps track payments.

rules.title: Scoring System
rules.winner_desc: Correct winner and goal difference (e.g. Bet 3x1, Result 2x0).
rules.draw_desc: Correct result (1x2) without exact score or diff.
rules.participation_desc: Guaranteed points for each prediction made.

review.title: All set!
review.subtitle: Review data before creating.
review.disclaimer: I declare that I am solely responsible for collecting and paying the prizes for this pool. I exempt ArenaCup from any financial responsibility.

create_bolao.type_placar_desc: Get the exact result of each match
create_bolao.type_express_desc: One game only – create in 10 seconds

list.title: Your Pools
list.empty_desc: You have not joined any pools yet.
list.no_results: No pools found with this name.

share.title: Invite Friends
share.subtitle: Invite everyone to "{{name}}"

join_modal.title: Paid Pool
join_modal.desc: This pool has an entry fee.
join_modal.terms: I am aware that payment must be handled directly with the administrator. The app does not process payments.

page.description: Create your pool, join by invite or explore public pools without cluttering the main flow.
page.join_success_desc: Now it's time to make predictions and climb the ranking.
page.empty_desc: Create your first pool or join one with an invite code.
page.public_unavailable_title: Public pools are unavailable right now
page.public_unavailable_desc: Your pools are still working normally. Please try again in a moment.
page.demo_1_desc: Try the full prediction and ranking flow.
page.demo_2_desc: Public arena to test invites, markets and live competition.
page.load_error_desc: Please try again in a few seconds.
page.join_error_desc: Check the code or try again in a moment.
page.already_joined: You are already in this pool.
page.invalid_code_desc: Check the invite and try again.
page.join_closed_error: This pool is not open for new entries right now.
page.rapid_desc: Pick one match, share the link and you're done.
page.intro_desc_worldcup: A pool is a competition between friends where everyone predicts World Cup matches. Create yours, invite the squad and see who knows football best.
page.intro_desc_championship: A pool is a competition between friends where everyone predicts {{championship}} matches. Create yours, invite the squad and see who knows football best.
page.groups_desc: Gather your pools in one group and track the overall ranking.

creation.format_desc: Choose the base experience for your pool. You can still adjust the markets in the next step.
creation.markets_desc: Turn on and off the markets that make sense for your pool.
creation.format_base_desc: This format starts with {{count}} default markets. You can customize it now without losing the model's coherence.
creation.scoring_desc: Choose the pool signature. This base applies to match markets and sets the competitive tone of the contest.
creation.review_desc: Check the pool identity, active markets and opening bet before publishing.
creation.fallback_description: No extra description. The whole dispute happens in the ranking.
creation.champion_desc: If this market is active, it is worth leaving creation with a house champion already set.

onboarding.title: How the pool {{name}} works
onboarding.format_desc: This pool uses the {{format}} format. You can start with match predictions and then explore extra markets as the league evolves.
onboarding.scope_match_desc: Scorelines, winner, total goals and match-level markets.
onboarding.scope_phase_desc: Qualified teams, semifinalists, finalists and other milestones.
onboarding.scope_tournament_desc: Champion, runner-up, top scorer and tournament reads.
onboarding.scope_special_desc: Power play, confidence, survivor and advanced formats.
onboarding.best_path_desc: Start with the match predictions tab. There you save your main results and, when the format requires it, also register match-linked extra markets.
onboarding.tour_ranking_title: Read the ranking like a tactical panel
onboarding.tour_ranking_desc: Now the ranking shows where your points come from: match, phase, tournament and special markets. That helps you understand where you're growing or falling behind.
onboarding.tour_games_desc: This is where the pool's most frequent picks live. Save scoreline, winner and match-linked markets to build your point base.
onboarding.tour_phase_desc: Qualified teams, semifinalists and finalists often move the ranking a lot. It is worth reviewing this tab whenever a new phase is about to start.
onboarding.tour_tournament_title: Tournament markets give personality to the pool
onboarding.tour_tournament_desc: Champion, runner-up, top scorer and tournament totals are more strategic and valuable bets over time.
onboarding.tour_special_desc: Use survivor, confidence, power play and bracket to gain an edge beyond the classic scoreline pick.

markets.save_market_error: I couldn't save this market right now.
markets.official_saved_desc: {{title}} was resolved for the league ranking.
markets.resolve_market_error: I couldn't resolve this market right now.
markets.save_official_error: I couldn't save the official result right now.
markets.no_phase_desc: When this pool activates qualification, finalists or phase picks, they will appear here.
markets.phase_desc: This is where qualification, semifinalist, finalist and other tournament milestone bets live.
markets.special_desc: These formats make the league more strategic, with decisions beyond the traditional scoreline.
markets.extras_desc: This is where tournament and special markets that give the pool its personality live.
markets.no_extras_desc: This pool has not activated tournament or special markets yet. When they exist, they appear here.
markets.market_closes_desc: This market closes automatically at the scheduled time.
markets.select_single_desc: Choose the team that best matches your pick.
markets.select_multi_desc: Choose up to {{count}} teams to build your selection.
markets.manage_result_desc: Set the official result to distribute this market's points.
markets.weight_desc: The higher the value, the stronger your bet in this market.
markets.active_market_desc: The specific interface for this market comes in the next step of the pool migration.
markets.legacy_desc: This pool still has legacy predictions saved. The new screen already reads these values to avoid losing context.

caixinha.prize_desc_placeholder: E.g.: Case of beer, dinner out...
caixinha.pix_placeholder: CPF, e-mail, phone or random key
caixinha.pix_required: PIX key required to receive payment.
caixinha.pix_invalid: Invalid format. Use CPF, CNPJ, e-mail, phone or random key.
caixinha.whatsapp_msg: Hey everyone in the pool "{{name}}" — everyone please send {{value}}{{pix}}. Prize: {{prize}}. Let's go! 🏆

grupos.limit_desc: The free plan lets you create 1 group. Copa Pass unlocks unlimited groups.
grupos.title: Groups
grupos.subtitle: Bring pools together in a group and compete on the overall leaderboard
grupos.empty_desc: Create your first group or join with an invite code.
grupos.private_desc: Join through a link or invite code.
grupos.public_desc: Anyone with the link can join.

invite.login_hint: Sign in or install the app to join for free.

bolao_detail.not_member: You are not a member of this pool.
bolao_detail.load_error_desc: Try again in a few moments.
bolao_detail.share_error_desc: Try again in a few seconds.
bolao_detail.not_found_desc: Check your link or go back to the list.

bracket_pick.unlocks_desc: To build the visual bracket, first save the semifinalists market in the phase tab. Then the bracket uses those four selections as its base.
bracket_pick.your_bracket_desc: Choose the semifinal winners and then lock in the champion in the final. The bracket uses your saved semifinalists.
bracket_pick.official_result_desc: As the creator, close the official semifinals and final here to distribute the points for this special market.
bracket_pick.final_locked_desc: Set the semifinal winners to unlock the final.
bracket_pick.official_final_locked_desc: Set the semifinal winners to resolve the final.

rachao.title: Quick pool
rachao.subtitle: Friends watching together
rachao.desc: Everyone picks a score, the app calculates everything and delivers the result ready. Zero complication.

campeonato.title: Season pool
campeonato.subtitle: Full tournament run
campeonato.desc: Scores and phases. Advancing through the stages also gives points. Ideal for following the whole tournament.

classico.title: High stakes
classico.subtitle: Only exact picks win big
classico.desc: Maximum points only for exact score hits. Great for serious contests or paid pools.

paywall.title: Limit reached
paywall.desc: The free plan allows 1 group. Copa Pass unlocks unlimited groups and pools.

success.share_message: 🔥 I just created my pool "{{name}}" on Arena Copa! Access code: {{code}}
success.desc: Now invite your friends to join!

name_step.title: Pool name
name_step.emoji_label: Choose an emoji to represent your pool

details_step.title: Final details
details_step.private_desc: Only people with the link or code
details_step.mode_exclusive_desc: Each scoreline can only be chosen by one person. If someone already picked 1-0, that scoreline is locked.
details_step.paid_desc: Collect between friends (handled outside the app)
details_step.prize_split_label: How should the prize be split?
details_step.prize_winner_desc: 100% of the value goes to first place
details_step.prize_podium_desc: Pays strong for 1st and still rewards 2nd and 3rd
details_step.paid_disclaimer: ⚠️ ArenaCopa is only a fun organization tool and does NOT process charges, payment splits or financial intermediation. The pool admin is fully responsible for collecting and paying the prize.
details_step.scoring_help: How much is each kind of hit worth? Choose the system that fits your group.
details_step.preset_risky_desc: Exact score: 20pts · Winner: 5pts · No participation bonus
details_step.after_create_hint: You will be able to invite friends right after creating it.

express.title: Express Pool
express.subtitle: One game only – create in 10 seconds
express.share_message: 🔥 Ready to predict? Match: {{home}} x {{away}}. Code: {{code}}
express.created_desc: Send the link to your friends. Everyone picks the scoreline they think will happen. The app handles the rest.
express.pick_match_desc: Pick a match, share the link with your friends, and let everyone predict the scoreline. The app calculates the rest.
express.no_matches_soon: No matches in the next few days
express.no_matches_desc: Try creating a full pool with the "Create pool" button.
express.footer_hint: Scoreline only. No setup. Zero friction.

express_sheet.title: Express Pool
express_sheet.empty_desc: As soon as matches are added, they will appear here.

public_picks.empty: Member predictions will appear here once the first match starts!

group_link.title: Link to a group
group_link.description: Associate this pool with a group you manage so it appears on the group dashboard.
group_link.link_success: Pool linked to the group successfully!

detail.disclaimer_payment: Payment is arranged externally between participants.
